title: Geographic data service | Stats NZ
content:
## Geographic data service
Geographic data service is Stats NZ's primary platform for geospatial data and statistical data in geospatial formats.
Use Geographic data service
Search, browse, and download geographic boundaries for New Zealand, and a selection of statistical data, including census data, in spatial formats.
You can download the data in a range of formats and coordinate systems. Formats include API (JSON and XML), WFS, and CS-W 2.02.
- Employment and unemployment
- Gender sex and intersex
